42:15:1: <font color="#CC0000">“I am the true vine, and My Father is the keeper of the vineyard.</font>
42:15:2: <font color="#CC0000">He cuts off every branch in Me that bears no fruit, and every branch that does bear fruit, He prunes to make it even more fruitful.</font>
42:15:3: <font color="#CC0000">You are already clean because of the word I have spoken to you.</font>
42:15:4: <font color="#CC0000">Remain in Me, and I will remain in you. Just as no branch can bear fruit by itself unless it remains in the vine, neither can you bear fruit unless you remain in Me.</font>
42:15:5: <font color="#CC0000">I am the vine and you are the branches. The one who remains in Me, and I in him, will bear much fruit. For apart from Me you can do nothing.</font>
42:15:6: <font color="#CC0000">If anyone does not remain in Me, he is like a branch that is thrown away and withers. Such branches are gathered up, thrown into the fire, and burned.</font>
42:15:7: <font color="#CC0000">If you remain in Me and My words remain in you, ask whatever you wish, and it will be done for you.</font>
42:15:8: <font color="#CC0000">This is to My Father’s glory, that you bear much fruit, proving yourselves to be My disciples.</font>
42:15:9: <font color="#CC0000">As the Father has loved Me, so have I loved you. Remain in My love.</font>
42:15:10: <font color="#CC0000">If you keep My commandments, you will remain in My love, just as I have kept My Father’s commandments and remain in His love.</font>
42:15:11: <font color="#CC0000">I have told you these things so that My joy may be in you and your joy may be complete.</font>
42:15:12: <font color="#CC0000">This is My commandment, that you love one another as I have loved you.</font>
42:15:13: <font color="#CC0000">Greater love has no one than this, that he lay down his life for his friends.</font>
42:15:14: <font color="#CC0000">You are My friends if you do what I command you.</font>
42:15:15: <font color="#CC0000">No longer do I call you servants, for a servant does not understand what his master is doing. But I have called you friends, because everything I have learned from My Father I have made known to you.</font>
42:15:16: <font color="#CC0000">You did not choose Me, but I chose you. And I appointed you to go and bear fruit—fruit that will remain—so that whatever you ask the Father in My name, He will give you.</font>
42:15:17: <font color="#CC0000">This is My command to you: Love one another.</font>
42:15:18: <font color="#CC0000">If the world hates you, understand that it hated Me first.</font>
42:15:19: <font color="#CC0000">If you were of the world, it would love you as its own. Instead, the world hates you, because you are not of the world, but I have chosen you out of the world.</font>
42:15:20: <font color="#CC0000">Remember the word that I spoke to you: ‘No servant is greater than his master.’ If they persecuted Me, they will persecute you as well; if they kept My word, they will keep yours as well.</font>
42:15:21: <font color="#CC0000">But they will treat you like this because of My name, since they do not know the One who sent Me.</font>
42:15:22: <font color="#CC0000">If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. Now, however, they have no excuse for their sin.</font>
42:15:23: <font color="#CC0000">Whoever hates Me hates My Father as well.</font>
42:15:24: <font color="#CC0000">If I had not done among them the works that no one else did, they would not be guilty of sin; but now they have seen and hated both Me and My Father.</font>
42:15:25: <font color="#CC0000">But this is to fulfill what is written in their Law: ‘They hated Me without reason.’</font>
42:15:26: <font color="#CC0000">When the Advocate comes, whom I will send to you from the Father—the Spirit of truth who proceeds from the Father—He will testify about Me.</font>
42:15:27: <font color="#CC0000">And you also must testify, because you have been with Me from the beginning.</font>
42:16:1: <font color="#CC0000">“I have told you these things so that you will not fall away.</font>
42:16:2: <font color="#CC0000">They will put you out of the synagogues. In fact, a time is coming when anyone who kills you will think he is offering a service to God.</font>
42:16:3: <font color="#CC0000">They will do these things because they have not known the Father or Me.</font>
42:16:4: <font color="#CC0000">But I have told you these things so that when their hour comes, you will remember that I told you about them. I did not tell you these things from the beginning, because I was with you.</font>
42:16:5: <font color="#CC0000">Now, however, I am going to Him who sent Me; yet none of you asks Me, ‘Where are You going?’</font>
42:16:6: <font color="#CC0000">Instead, your hearts are filled with sorrow because I have told you these things.</font>
42:16:7: <font color="#CC0000">But I tell you the truth, it is for your benefit that I am going away. Unless I go away, the Advocate will not come to you; but if I go, I will send Him to you.</font>
42:16:8: <font color="#CC0000">And when He comes, He will convict the world in regard to sin and righteousness and judgment:</font>
42:16:9: <font color="#CC0000">in regard to sin, because they do not believe in Me;</font>
42:16:10: <font color="#CC0000">in regard to righteousness, because I am going to the Father and you will no longer see Me;</font>
42:16:11: <font color="#CC0000">and in regard to judgment, because the prince of this world has been condemned.</font>
42:16:12: <font color="#CC0000">I still have much to tell you, but you cannot yet bear to hear it.</font>
42:16:13: <font color="#CC0000">However, when the Spirit of truth comes, He will guide you into all truth. For He will not speak on His own, but He will speak what He hears, and He will declare to you what is to come.</font>
42:16:14: <font color="#CC0000">He will glorify Me by taking from what is Mine and disclosing it to you.</font>
42:16:15: <font color="#CC0000">Everything that belongs to the Father is Mine. That is why I said that the Spirit will take from what is Mine and disclose it to you.</font>
42:16:16: <font color="#CC0000">In a little while you will see Me no more, and then after a little while you will see Me.”</font>
42:16:19: Aware that they wanted to question Him, Jesus said to them, “Are you asking one another why <font color="#CC0000">I said, ‘In a little while you will not see Me, and then after a little while you will see Me</font>’?
42:16:20: <font color="#CC0000">Truly, truly, I tell you, you will weep and wail while the world rejoices. You will grieve, but your grief will turn to joy.</font>
42:16:21: <font color="#CC0000">A woman has pain in childbirth because her time has come; but when she brings forth her child, she forgets her anguish because of her joy that a child has been born into the world.</font>
42:16:22: <font color="#CC0000">So also you have sorrow now, but I will see you again and your hearts will rejoice, and no one will take away your joy.</font>
42:16:23: <font color="#CC0000">In that day you will no longer ask Me anything. Truly, truly, I tell you, whatever you ask the Father in My name, He will give you.</font>
42:16:24: <font color="#CC0000">Until now you have not asked for anything in My name. Ask and you will receive, so that your joy may be complete.</font>
42:16:25: <font color="#CC0000">I have spoken these things to you in figures of speech. An hour is coming when I will no longer speak to you this way, but will tell you plainly about the Father.</font>
42:16:26: <font color="#CC0000">In that day you will ask in My name. I am not saying that I will ask the Father on your behalf.</font>
42:16:27: <font color="#CC0000">For the Father Himself loves you, because you have loved Me and have believed that I came from God.</font>
42:16:28: <font color="#CC0000">I came from the Father and entered the world. In turn, I will leave the world and go to the Father.”</font>
42:16:31: <font color="#CC0000">“Do you finally believe?</font>” Jesus replied.
42:16:32: <font color="#CC0000">“Look, an hour is coming and has already come when you will be scattered, each to his own home, and you will leave Me all alone. Yet I am not alone, because the Father is with Me.</font>

42:17:1: When Jesus had spoken these things, He lifted up His eyes to heaven and said, “<font color="#CC0000">Father, the hour has come. Glorify Your Son, that Your Son may glorify</font> You.
42:17:2: <font color="#CC0000">For You granted Him authority over all people, so that He may give eternal life to all those You have given Him.</font>
42:17:3: <font color="#CC0000">Now this is eternal life, that they may know You, the only true God, and Jesus Christ, whom You have sent.</font>
42:17:4: <font color="#CC0000">I have glorified You on earth by accomplishing the work You gave Me to do.</font>
42:17:5: <font color="#CC0000">And now, Father, glorify Me in Your presence with the glory I had with You before the world existed.</font>
42:17:6: <font color="#CC0000">I have revealed Your name to those You have given Me out of the world. They were Yours; You gave them to Me, and they have kept Your word.</font>
42:17:7: <font color="#CC0000">Now they know that everything You have given Me comes from You.</font>
42:17:8: <font color="#CC0000">For I have given them the words You gave Me, and they have received them. They knew with certainty that I came from You, and they believed that You sent Me.</font>
42:17:9: <font color="#CC0000">I ask on their behalf. I do not ask on behalf of the world, but on behalf of those You have given Me; for they are Yours.</font>
42:17:10: <font color="#CC0000">All I have is Yours, and all You have is Mine; and in them I have been glorified.</font>
42:17:11: <font color="#CC0000">I will no longer be in the world, but they are in the world, and I am coming to You.  Holy Father, protect them by Your name, the name You gave Me, so that they may be one as We are one.</font>
42:17:12: <font color="#CC0000">While I was with them, I protected and preserved them by Your name, the name You gave Me. Not one of them has been lost, except the son of destruction, so that the Scripture would be fulfilled.</font>
42:17:13: <font color="#CC0000">But now I am coming to You; and I am saying these things while I am in the world, so that they may have My joy fulfilled within them.</font>
42:17:14: <font color="#CC0000">I have given them Your word and the world has hated them; for they are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.</font>
42:17:15: <font color="#CC0000">I am not asking that You take them out of the world, but that You keep them from the evil one.</font>
42:17:16: <font color="#CC0000">They are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.</font>
42:17:17: <font color="#CC0000">Sanctify them by the truth; Your word is truth.</font>
42:17:18: <font color="#CC0000">As You sent Me into the world, I have also sent them into the world.</font>
42:17:19: <font color="#CC0000">For them I sanctify Myself, so that they too may be sanctified by the truth.</font>
42:17:20: <font color="#CC0000">I am not asking on behalf of them alone, but also on behalf of those who will believe in Me through their message,</font>
42:17:21: <font color="#CC0000">that all of them may be one, as You, Father, are in Me, and I am in You. May they also be in Us, so that the world may believe that You sent Me.</font>
42:17:22: <font color="#CC0000">I have given them the glory You gave Me, so that they may be one as We are one—</font>
42:17:23: <font color="#CC0000">I in them and You in Me—that they may be perfectly united, so that the world may know that You sent Me and have loved them just as You have loved Me.</font>
42:17:24: <font color="#CC0000">Father, I want those You have given Me to be with Me where I am, that they may see the glory You gave Me because You loved Me before the foundation of the world.</font>
42:17:25: <font color="#CC0000">Righteous Father, although the world has not known You, I know You, and they know that You sent Me.</font>
42:17:26: <font color="#CC0000">And I have made Your name known to them and will continue to make it known, so that the love You have for Me may be in them, and I in them.”</font>

65:3:1: <font color="#CC0000">“To the angel of the church in Sardis write:  These are the words of the One who holds the seven Spirits of God and the seven stars.  I know your deeds; you have a reputation for being alive, yet you are dead.</font>
65:3:2: <font color="#CC0000">Wake up and strengthen what remains, which was about to die; for I have found your deeds incomplete in the sight of My God.</font>
65:3:3: <font color="#CC0000">Remember, then, what you have received and heard. Keep it and repent. If you do not wake up, I will come like a thief, and you will not know the hour when I will come upon you.</font>
65:3:4: <font color="#CC0000">But you do have a few people in Sardis who have not soiled their garments, and because they are worthy, they will walk with Me in white.</font>
65:3:5: <font color="#CC0000">Like them, he who overcomes will be dressed in white. And I will never blot out his name from the Book of Life, but I will confess his name before My Father and His angels.</font>
65:3:6: <font color="#CC0000">He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.</font>
65:3:7: <font color="#CC0000">To the angel of the church in Philadelphia write:  These are the words of the One who is holy and true, who holds the key of David. What He opens no one can shut, and what He shuts no one can open.</font>
65:3:8: <font color="#CC0000">I know your deeds. See, I have placed before you an open door, which no one can shut. For you have only a little strength, yet you have kept My word and have not denied My name.</font>
65:3:9: <font color="#CC0000">Look at those who belong to the synagogue of Satan, who claim to be Jews but are liars instead. I will make them come and bow down at your feet, and they will know that I love you.</font>
65:3:10: <font color="#CC0000">Because you have kept My command to persevere, I will also keep you from the hour of testing that is about to come upon the whole world, to test those who dwell on the earth.</font>
65:3:11: <font color="#CC0000">I am coming soon. Hold fast to what you have, so that no one will take your crown.</font>
65:3:12: <font color="#CC0000">The one who overcomes I will make a pillar in the temple of My God, and he will never again leave it. Upon him I will write the name of My God, and the name of the city of My God (the new Jerusalem that comes down out of heaven from My God), and My new name.</font>
65:3:13: <font color="#CC0000">He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.</font>
65:3:14: <font color="#CC0000">To the angel of the church in Laodicea write:  These are the words of the Amen, the faithful and true Witness, the Originator of God’s creation.</font>
65:3:15: <font color="#CC0000">I know your deeds; you are neither cold nor hot. How I wish you were one or the other!</font>
65:3:16: <font color="#CC0000">So because you are lukewarm—neither hot nor cold—I am about to vomit you out of My mouth!</font>
65:3:17: <font color="#CC0000">You say, ‘I am rich; I have grown wealthy and need nothing.’ But you do not realize that you are wretched, pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.</font>
65:3:18: <font color="#CC0000">I counsel you to buy from Me gold refined by fire so that you may become rich, white garments so that you may be clothed and your shameful nakedness not exposed, and salve to anoint your eyes so that you may see.</font>
65:3:19: <font color="#CC0000">Those I love, I rebuke and discipline. Therefore be earnest and repent.</font>
65:3:20: <font color="#CC0000">Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears My voice and opens the door, I will come in and dine with him, and he with Me.</font>
65:3:21: <font color="#CC0000">To the one who overcomes, I will grant the right to sit with Me on My throne, just as I overcame and sat down with My Father on His throne.</font>
65:3:22: <font color="#CC0000">He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.”</font>
65:22:7: <font color="#CC0000">“Behold, I am coming soon. Blessed is the one who keeps the words of prophecy in this book.”</font>
65:22:12: <font color="#CC0000">“Behold, I am coming soon, and My reward is with Me, to give to each one according to what he has done.</font>
65:22:13: <font color="#CC0000">I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.”</font>
65:22:16: <font color="#CC0000">“I, Jesus, have sent My angel to give you this testimony for the churches. I am the Root and the Offspring of David, the bright Morning Star.”</font>
65:22:20: <font color="#CC0000">He who testifies to these things says, “Yes, I am coming soon.” Amen. Come, Lord Jesus!</font>
